headings.font_family: Neue Haas Grotesk, PP Mori, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
headings.usage_rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings. Use fluid scales max text-6xl for Hero.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: bento-tetris for marketing, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12)
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px) for sharp premium feel
layout_spacing.optical_alignment: left-align for reading, strict bento grids for triggers and cases

hover_states.cards: hover lift (-translate-y-1) with subtle glow (shadow-2xl shadow-white/5)
hover_states.buttons: smooth fill transition, inverted colors on hover (bg-white text-black -> hover:bg-[#151515] hover:text-white border border-white)

motion_and_interactions.restrictions: No sharp effects, no blinking, no random popups (only exit-intent).

hero.layout: Grid with heavy typography on left, clear CTA, phone number prominent

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-white px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors

quiz_calculator.design: Clean minimal modal or dedicated section, step indicators, large selectable cards for options

team.layout: 4 master cards with tab/switch interaction. 3 USP tags per master.

guarantee_documents.interaction: Interactive A4 preview fan spread on right, cards on left. Modal view with zoom/fullscreen/swipe.

marquee.mask: gradient mask on edges for smooth fade

hero_bmw.description: Dark cinematic BMW photo with DRLs on

hero_bmw_alt.description: Front facing BMW in the dark

team_worker_1.description: Premium garage worker washing luxury car

instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts. Use shadcn/ui strictly for interactive bits (dialogs, accordions).
Strictly adhere to the color palette. No blue, gold, or red anywhere.
Ensure 1px solid borders (#222222 or white/10) to separate dark elements instead of shadows.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and interactive components.
Implement the quiz using a step-based state in React.
Implement Framer Motion specifically for the fade+up scroll reveal as defined.
Keep typography huge and tight in headings, generous line-height in body text.
For the guarantee A4 fan spread, use Framer Motion to fan out the cards visually.
All components must be in .js (React), not .tsx.
